pi_items.source: Verified against task description and verifier.py which explicitly check this exact file path.
Verified against task description requiring 'Site Safety Walk' as the task name.
Verified. Task description asks for 'Friday', which corresponds to index 4 in Python's datetime.weekday() logic used by verifier.
Verified. Based on dates Feb 3, 2025 to Mar 31, 2025, there are 8 Fridays. The verifier uses 5 as a minimum valid threshold.
Verified. The task specifies starting Feb 3, 2025. The verifier correctly filters tasks from Feb 1.
Verified. The task specifies ending Mar 31, 2025. The verifier correctly filters tasks until Apr 1.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic enterprise software development project file. The target is to add a recurring task series named 'Site Safety Walk' with a weekly frequency (7-day interval) occurring on Fridays (datetime weekday index 4). The series must span from early February 2025 to late March 2025, producing at least 5 instances (actually 8 Fridays exist in this range). The final modified project must be saved to /home/ga/Projects/safety_schedule.xml.
